docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF RAOUF BOUZIDI. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT SUN DUCK LEE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J RANDLE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $11,438.00 FILED BY BOUZIDI, RAOUF AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, SUN DUCK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOUZIDI, RAOUF
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF BOUZIDI, RAOUF
COPYING FEES (19 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BOUZIDI, RAOUF

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE: $50.00 (WAIVED) REMARKS: NO ANSWER, IT WAS THE LAST DAY TO MAKE AN ATTEMPT. THERE WAS NOT ENOUGH TIME GIVEN FOR A THIRD ATTEMPT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOUZIDI, RAOUF AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, SUN DUCK
DECLARATION RE: RESET HEARING DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOUZIDI, RAOUF
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-14-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-21-2026 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE AND PROOF OF UNSUCCESSFUL SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOUZIDI, RAOUF AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, SUN DUCK
DECLARATION RE: RESET HEARING DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOUZIDI, RAOUF
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-23-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-14-2026 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE: $50.00 (WAIVED) REMARKS: THERE WAS NO ANSWER AFTER THE THIRD AND FINAL ATTEMPT. SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT COULD NOT BE LOCATED. MULTIPLE STTEMPTS WERE MADE WITHOUT SUCCESS, AND THERE WAS NO RESPONSE TO THE NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRES. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOUZIDI, RAOUF AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, SUN DUCK
